title: Macky-Wang/RNA-m5C-HSPC-Expansion: RNA-m5C-HSPC-expansion
author: Macky-Wang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We characterize the mRNA m5C landscape of nascent, fetal and adult HSPCs in zebrafish and found that m5C modification is essential for HSPC expansion through maintaining mRNA stability. Deletion of the m5C reader, Y-box binding protein 1 (Ybx1), significantly inhibits the proliferation of HSPCs.
steps_raw: We characterize the mRNA m5C landscape of nascent, fetal and adult HSPCs in zebrafish and found that m5C modification is essential for HSPC expansion through maintaining mRNA stability. Deletion of the m5C reader, Y-box binding protein 1 (Ybx1), significantly inhibits the proliferation of HSPCs.
